faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Piscataway typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and provide detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-6 hours for an average-sized home. Heat treatments typically require one intensive session, while chemical treatments may need 2-3 visits spaced weeks apart. We'll provide a specific timeline during your inspection based on your infestation level.

faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are safe when applied by our certified technicians.
